mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(category, '未分类') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM product GROUP BY COALESCE(category, '未分类') ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT DATE(trace_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM trace_record WHERE trace_time >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(trace_time) ORDER BY DATE(trace_time)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(production_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS batchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS productCount FROM batch WHERE production_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(production_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, COALESCE(p.category, '未分类') AS category, COALESCE(p.origin, '未填写') AS origin, COUNT(t.id) AS traceCount, MAX(t.trace_time) AS lastTraceTime FROM product p LEFT JOIN trace_record t ON t.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category, p.origin ORDER BY traceCount DESC, p.name ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(origin, '未填写') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM product GROUP BY COALESCE(origin, '未填写') ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT p.name AS productName, COALESCE(p.category, '未分类') AS category, COUNT(b.id) AS batchCount, MIN(b.production_date) AS firstProductionDate, MAX(b.production_date) AS lastProductionDate FROM product p LEFT JOIN batch b ON b.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY batchCount DESC, p.name ASC

SELECT CASE action_type WHEN 'CREATE' THEN '新增' WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN '更新' WHEN 'DELETE' THEN '删除' ELSE COALESCE(action_type, '其他') END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM blockchain_log GROUP BY action_type ORDER BY value DESC
